---
title: "Elshan Garashli"
---

::: {.home-header}
## Elshan Garashli

PhD Candidate in Economics  
University of Graz
:::

::: {.home-intro}
::: {.home-text}
I am an economist working in microeconomic theory, information economics, communication games, and information design. My research studies strategic communication, especially how information structures shape what can be credibly communicated in games.

I am on the academic job market in economics.
:::

::: {.home-photo}
![](aktualles_foto_homepage_new.jpg){fig-alt="Elshan Garashli" .profile-photo}
:::
:::

### Research Fields

Microeconomic Theory, Information Economics, Communication Games, Information Design

### Contact

Institute of Economics  
University of Graz  
Graz, Austria  

Email: [elshan.garashli@gmail.com](mailto:elshan.garashli@gmail.com)  
CV: [Download PDF](files/cv_elshan_garashli_unigraz.pdf)
